response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics and performance content matched the reference lyrics for 'Luna say maybe' and 'You & 合図'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully leveraged for song identification and lyrics disambiguation. The intermission talk segment was manually transcribed and translated due to missing details in the reference JSON.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual text for the title card of 'You & 合図' during the intro silence, followed by precise, audio-anchored subtitle pacing for all vocal sections, respecting the natural breaks and rapid delivery of the artist. Fixed a typo in the timestamp index at 00:58.500.

subtitles.original: ないまま
subtitles.english: ...without even taking a breath...

subtitles.original: 君のこと守れるのかな
subtitles.english: can I protect you?

subtitles.original: どうか 正心正銘のこの思いを聴いて
subtitles.english: Please, listen to this truly genuine feeling of mine

subtitles.original: 私 全身全霊で歌うから
subtitles.english: because I will sing with all my heart and soul

subtitles.original: 大丈夫 世界はこんなに綺麗だと
subtitles.english: It's okay, I understand that the world is so beautiful...

subtitles.original: 分かってる 分かってる 分かってる 分かってるよ
subtitles.english: I know, I know, I know, I do know!

subtitles.original: ごめんね じれったい
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, it's frustrating.

subtitles.original: 足りない こんなんじゃ誰 mo aisenai no
subtitles.english: It's not enough, I can't love anyone like this

subtitles.original: 止めない 止まることは知らないの
subtitles.english: Don't stop, I don't know how to stop

subtitles.original: 言葉足らず 失くしてしまう物ばかりだ
subtitles.english: I'm just lacking words, constantly losing things

subtitles.original: Luna say maybe...
subtitles.english: Luna say maybe...

subtitles.original: 降るのは 迷be, rainy
subtitles.english: It's falling, Maybe, rainy

subtitles.original: 愛せ どんな自分でも
subtitles.english: Love yourself, no matter who you are

subtitles.original: Maybe, ネイビー色に染まるまで
subtitles.english: Maybe, until it is dyed in navy

subtitles.original: 時間はかかるかもしれないけど
subtitles.english: It might take some time, but...

subtitles.original: I know, 輝くしかないこと
subtitles.english: I know, there's no choice but to shine

subtitles.original: ハイライト 塗り続けるしかない
subtitles.english: Highlight, I have no choice but to keep painting it

subtitles.original: 真実はちゃんと 言わなくちゃね
subtitles.english: I have to speak the truth clearly, right?

subtitles.original: 目に見えるものが
subtitles.english: To things that can be seen...

subtitles.original: 続くと、ずっと そう、ずっと
subtitles.english: continuing, forever... yes, forever.

subtitles.original: 君に 半信半疑な素振りして
subtitles.english: Acting half-doubting towards you,

subtitles.original: 心 空回り 遠回り
subtitles.english: My heart spins in circles, taking detours

subtitles.original: 最低だ もう一回やり直せるのなら
subtitles.english: It's the worst, if I could redo it one more time,

subtitles.original: 素真になりたい なりたい なりたいと 願ったジレンマ
subtitles.english: I want to be honest, I want to, I want to... my wished-for dilemma

subtitles.original: このまま 1人じゃ何もできない
subtitles.english: At this rate, I can't do anything alone

subtitles.original: 全部 決めるのは 自分次第
subtitles.english: Everything is up to me to decide

subtitles.original: 初めて背中をみた時に
subtitles.english: When I first saw your back,

subtitles.original: 覚悟を決めた どこまで
subtitles.english: I made up my mind. How far...

subtitles.original: いけるのか
subtitles.english: can I go?

subtitles.original: 届くのか
subtitles.english: Will I reach it?

subtitles.original: わからないよ
subtitles.english: I don't know...

subtitles.original: 臆病がそこに立っている
subtitles.english: Cowardice is standing right there.

subtitles.original: 3秒前バックステージ 震える背中を君に預けて
subtitles.english: 3 seconds before backstage, I entrust my trembling back to you

subtitles.original: この運命的出会いは きっと
subtitles.english: This fated meeting is surely...

subtitles.original: そう、きっと
subtitles.english: ...yes, surely...

subtitles.original: 偶然みたいな
subtitles.english: ...like a coincidence.

subtitles.original: 多分、神様のいたずらです
subtitles.english: Perhaps, it's a prank by God.

subtitles.original: どうか 正心正銘のこの思いが
subtitles.english: Please, until this truly genuine feeling of mine...

subtitles.original: 君の心(ところ)にちゃんと届くまで
subtitles.english: ...reaches your heart properly.

subtitles.original: ここで 私 全身全霊で歌うから
subtitles.english: Here, I will sing with all my heart and soul, so...

subtitles.original: 待ってる 待っている
subtitles.english: I'm waiting, I'm waiting,

subtitles.original: だから、この場所を大切にしたいの
subtitles.english: So, I want to cherish this place.

subtitles.original: これが 正心正銘の私なんだ
subtitles.english: This is the truly genuine me!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫 もう怖くはないわ
subtitles.english: It's okay, I'm not afraid anymore!

subtitles.original: たまにつまずくことならあるけど
subtitles.english: Sometimes I might stumble, but...

subtitles.original: 一番特等席で 君の笑顔見たいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to see your smile from the very best seat

subtitles.original: 私だけの特権
subtitles.english: My exclusive privilege

subtitles.original: 見えない未来 手探り今日も
subtitles.english: Even today, groping through an unseen future...

subtitles.original: ステージの上で 証明してみせるから
subtitles.english: I'll prove it to you on this stage!

subtitles.original: ここにしかないスクリーンに
subtitles.english: On the screen that only exists here...

subtitles.original: 君にまだ話せてないこと
subtitles.english: There are still things I haven't told you...

subtitles.original: ばかりあるんだ
subtitles.english: ...so many of them.

subtitles.original: 聞いてほしいの
subtitles.english: I want you to hear them...

subtitles.original: あのね...
subtitles.english: You see...

subtitles.original: はあ... みんな、見に来てくれて本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: Phew... Everyone, thank you so much for coming to see me!

subtitles.original: 最後は新曲をお届けします。
subtitles.english: Lastly, I'll be delivering my new song.

subtitles.original: 聞いてください。
subtitles.english: Please listen.

subtitles.original: You & 合図
subtitles.english: [Song: You & Aizu]

subtitles.original: 目覚めの合図
subtitles.english: The signal of awakening

subtitles.original: スマホが踊る
subtitles.english: My smartphone dances
